name: Brevo (Email Marketing & Transactional API)
pricing_notes: Free: 300 emails/day; Starter €25/mo (20K emails); Business €65/mo; Enterprise custom

auth.notes: API key in header: api-key: YOUR_API_KEY

performance.notes: REST API; transactional email delivery speed varies by plan

agent_readiness.notes:
Email marketing + transactional email platform (formerly Sendinblue). import sib_api_v3_sdk. config = sib_api_v3_sdk.Configuration(api_key={'api-key': key}). api = sib_api_v3_sdk.TransactionalEmailsApi(client). api.send_transac_email(sib_api_v3_sdk.SendSmtpEmail(to=[{'email': 'user@example.com'}], subject='Hello', html_content='

Hi

')). Contact management. Email campaigns. SMS. WhatsApp Business API. CRM contacts. Marketing automation workflows. SMTP relay.

gotchas: SDK package name is 'sib-api-v3-sdk' (legacy Sendinblue name)
Free tier limited to 300 emails/day — restrictive for testing
SDK ergonomics less polished than Resend or Mailgun
Brevo rebrand may cause documentation inconsistency
best_when: Email marketing + transactional email from single platform
European companies preferring EU-based email provider
SMBs needing email + SMS + WhatsApp + CRM in one tool
Cost-effective alternative to Mailchimp + SendGrid combo
avoid_when: Developer-first transactional email (Resend or Mailgun simpler)
High-volume transactional email (SendGrid or Amazon SES cheaper)
Enterprise marketing automation (HubSpot or Klaviyo better)
summary: Brevo (formerly Sendinblue) is a European email marketing + transactional API platform. sib_api_v3_sdk.TransactionalEmailsApi().send_transac_email(). Email campaigns, contacts, SMS, WhatsApp, CRM in one platform. GDPR-friendly EU-based. SDK package name is still 'sib-api-v3-sdk'. Free tier: 300 emails/day. Alternative to Mailchimp+SendGrid combo for SMBs wanting unified marketing + transactional email.
